Document:
# Fugitives
Fugitives are [color={role-type-team-antagonist-color}][bold]antagonists[/bold][/color] and enemies of [bold]Nanotrasen[/bold]. Your goal is to survive and avoid capture by incoming bounty hunters.
- You spawn with improvised tools and survival gear. Use maintenance and station chaos to stay hidden. - Avoid direct fights when possible. Being alive and uncaptured is usually your best path to victory. - If you must fight, do it on your terms: ambushes, escapes, and mobility matter more than holding ground.
## Round Context
Fugitive rounds are team-based. - [bold]Fugitives[/bold] are the hunted antagonists. - [bold]Hunters[/bold] are free-agent bounty hunters focused on fugitives specifically.
You are not expected to cooperate with station command or security. Stay free, stay alive, and avoid capture.
